commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates item and commit review prompts, REVIEW_POLICY_VERSION, prompt tests, changelog text, git-publish test environment cleanup, and a PR egg asset for AGENTS.md review-policy semantics.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection of the proposed prompts shows the full-file AGENTS.md requirement is absent while the linked source issue requires it. Runtime reproduction is not applicable because this is prompt-policy behavior.
commands.review_followup: Queue a narrow repair because the remaining blocker is localized prompt/test wording already specified by the source issue and prior review.

target.title: Feat: Treat AGENTS.md as review policy in prompts
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat target AGENTS.md as optional repository-authored review policy and guidance in item and commit review prompts.
- Keep AGENTS.md below ClawSweeper/system/developer instructions and preserve existing repository profile and owner fallback behavior.
- Add focused prompt tests for the policy-overlay semantics and bump REVIEW_POLICY_VERSION so existing complete reviews refresh.

## Source
- Implements https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/185.
- Builds on the narrower read-and-follow AGENTS.md work from https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/173; credit to @Takhoffman for both the source issue and groundwork.

## Implementation Notes
- In prompts/review-item.md, concrete actionable AGENTS.md conflicts in PR diffs can become reviewFindings using existing finding kinds; issue or non-patch policy conflicts should route through existing risks, bestSolution, solutionAssessment, or workReason fields.
- In prompts/review-commit.md, AGENTS.md conflicts should become findings only when they create concrete bug, regression, security, compatibility, validation, supply-chain, or similar maintainer-relevant risk.
- Do not add a parser, new target-repo config, schema fields, labels, dispatcher/webhook changes, or repository-profile migration.
- Add the required CHANGELOG.md entry if it is not already present.

## Validation
- pnpm run test:unit
- pnpm run check

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-clawsweeper-185
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Source issue by @Takhoffman: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/185.; Preserve context from the already-merged groundwork PR by @Takhoffman: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/173.
- Validation: pnpm run test:unit; pnpm run check
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning high; reviewed against f2c9f9fea4fb.
